name: navidrome
description: Operate a self-hosted Navidrome music server through its Subsonic API with direct HTTP calls — ping, browse artists/albums, search, and list playlists.

navidrome_url.title: Navidrome URL
navidrome_url.description: Base URL of your Navidrome server, including scheme and (if non-default) port. Example: https://music.example.com or http://localhost:4533. Do NOT include a trailing /rest path — the skill appends Subsonic endpoints.

navidrome_username.title: Username
navidrome_username.description: Navidrome account username used for Subsonic API authentication.

navidrome_password.title: Password
navidrome_password.description: Navidrome account password. Used only to derive the per-request Subsonic token = md5(password + salt); the raw password is never sent over the wire. Stored in secure OS storage, not settings.json.
